---
title: "Hyla_Exploration"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
```

## Load Data

```{r}
data.frame(HylaMeta)
#View(HylaMeta)
```

## Graph

```{r}

boxplot(HylaMeta$Metamorph_time ~ HylaMeta$Tox_conc)

```

## Signifigance

```{r}
SigM <- aov(Metamorph_time ~ Tox_conc, data = HylaMeta)
summary(SigM)
```
